criteria.requirement: npm run goal runs the full 8-phase flow (research→ingest→derive→build→verify→loop→record→ship) and exits 0
npm run build (= research && derive && verify && next build) exits 0
Research Phase 0 emits the canonical + findings as one deterministic pipe
criteria.check: artifacts/research-findings.json has 16 verdicts + 40 gaps AND data/notre-dame-canonical.json present; byte-stable across two replay runs

criteria.requirement: Every dimension carries {provenance, source, url, rights}
Zero unsourced components — G09 source-registry passes (a source must resolve to the rights-cleared registry, not merely be non-empty)
No fabrication: no measured/reconstructed_design node cites a non-registry source; GAP fields left unfilled (no invented numbers)
criteria.check: every source cross-refs the rights table; GAP-marked fields contain no value

criteria.requirement: No restricted assets ingested (Tallon/AGP/CNRS/blog = cite-only)
Deterministic verifier (V-checks recomputed from component coords, never spec.key_dimensions, + pixel checks) passes
criteria.check: verifier-report exit 0; V08–V14 + P01–P03 all pass

criteria.requirement: Vision-verifier sub-agent passes in a fresh context
Measured-reality guard (V08 for the spire; the V09-analog from Nanchan): demo:corrupt → verify refuses (exit 1) → demo:restore → green. The build cannot ship geometry idealized toward the rulebook
criteria.check: orchestrate LOOP recorded a corrupt→refuse(exit 1)→restore→green beat

criteria.requirement: ≥1 logged fail→revise→pass cycle; failed reports kept
criteria.check: ≥1 artifacts/verifier-report.*.failed.json present alongside the passing report

criteria.requirement: Derive emits structural-spec + derivation-log; the comp() unsourced-component audit threw nothing
All geometry is procedural — no imported meshes
criteria.check: no .glb/.gltf/.obj/.fbx import in components/ or the scene module

criteria.requirement: Provenance toggle works (colour by evidence class)
criteria.check: P03 shows all four evidence-class colours

criteria.requirement: Click-to-inspect shows FR/EN name + role + citation
criteria.check: SpireViewer Inspector present + components carry name_fr/en, role, source, url, rights

criteria.requirement: Construction-sequence animation plays (real-time Build Theater)
Drawing → 3D reveal works
A recorded artifacts/run-*.webm exists
Live URL responds 200
Public repo (hackathon rule — private = DQ)
README with pitch, problem, method, source/rights table, why Fable 5, rerun instructions
criteria.check: README.md present with those sections + the rights table

criteria.requirement: Session log shows long autonomous stretches; human interventions are new-information only (not course-corrections)
criteria.check: review the session log; interventions limited to credentials/new info

criteria.requirement: Rerunnable: npm run goal works from a clean checkout and is building-parameterized; Nanchan stays green as the regression anchor
criteria.check: fresh clone + npm run goal reaches green; --building nanchan still passes
